response.overview: The true story of a group of friends who are united in their passion for music. Rock n' Roll, to be specific, Heavy Metal, to be exact! Takes place in the late 1980's. Sex, drugs, and Rock n' Roll is the battle cry of the day! The phone is ringing, door is knocking, and the Metal is blasting. People are coming and going. Simultaneous conversations declare multiple forms of revolution and frivolity. Earthquakes, brawls, raids and mosh pits are only distractions until the next concert. The pace is as fast as the music. But it was just another day when it was happening. They didn't know it at the time but it was the end of an era. They knew one eternal truth though; Rock n' Roll will never die!
response.title: Metal Heads
